name: Joe Biden
subject: My plan for racial economic equity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I'm laying out the fourth plank of Build Back Better -- advancing racial equity across the American economy. |
---
Peter --

Over the past few weeks, I've emailed you to talk about the first three planks of my economic recovery plan, Build Back Better.

These planks lay out how I'll make historic investments in American manufacturing and innovation, in clean energy jobs and infrastructure that will meet the climate crisis head-on, and in building a caring economy that eases the burden on caregivers.

Each of these plans intentionally deals with systemic racism and advances racial equity in our economy. But that isn't enough, so I'm laying out the fourth plank of Build Back Better -- **advancing racial equity across the American economy, not just as part of the other pillars of Build Back Better, but in its own right.**

[I'll explain more in a moment. But if you're with me in this fight to advance racial equity across this country, can you add your name? We can make this plan a reality, but we can't do that without a collective commitment, and that starts with signing your name:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cd2/1125343723/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/racial-equity-bbb-petition?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B3_jrbracialequityplan_X__F1_S1_C2__nd_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B3_jrbracialequityplan_X__F1_S1_C2__nd_T2") | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cd2/1125343723/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/racial-equity-bbb-petition?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B3_jrbracialequityplan_X__F1_S1_C2__nd_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B3_jrbracialequityplan_X__F1_S1_C2__nd_T2")
---
For generations, Americans who are Black, Brown, Asian American, Native American, or immigrants, haven't always been fully included in our democracy or our economy. Peter, here's how my bold, practical plan will help build a stronger, more just, more sustainable economy -- where everyone is included in the deal.

**To start, we 'll create a new Small Business Opportunity Fund.** This fund will dramatically expand a successful Obama-Biden initiative that generated more than $5 in private investment for every $1 in public investment in small businesses -- particularly in hard-pressed areas. With a $30 billion initial investment, we will make sure that those with the best ideas are not denied the venture capital or financing they need because of their race or ZIP code.

And to further support Black and Brown small businesses, fifty percent of emergency small business relief would be reserved for the smallest businesses with 50 employees or fewer, including micro-businesses and sole proprietorships. This would help minority-owned businesses get life-saving loans before more well-connected businesses jump ahead in line.

**Next, we 'll expand access to homeownership in Black and Brown communities.** The homeownership gap is a cause and consequence of the racial wealth gap. That's why my housing plan includes a $15,000 first-time home-buyer tax credit, expands affordable housing, and puts an end to systemic housing discrimination. This will remove barriers to homeownership that now hold back too many Americans of color on the pathway to the middle class.

**And I 'll strengthen the Federal Reserve's focus on racial economic equity.** Under my plan, the Fed will aggressively target persistent racial gaps in jobs, wages, and wealth -- and revise its own hiring and employment practices to achieve greater diversity at all levels of the institution. So when the Chairman of the Federal Reserve provides a report on the health of the economy -- we'll know if the economy is working for everyone.

Peter, these are just some of the real, concrete steps we can take to advance racial economic equity across the United States.

This is progress we can make if we fight for it, together. So, Peter, if you're ready to build back our economy better than it was before Trump and the coronavirus, and make sure we make progress towards racial economic equity:

[Will you sign your name and commit to fighting with me so we can make this plan a reality? Adding your name will make a real difference.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cd2/1125343723/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/racial-equity-bbb-petition?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B3_jrbracialequityplan_X__F1_S1_C2__nd_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B3_jrbracialequityplan_X__F1_S1_C2__nd_T2")

Thank you,

Joe

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cc8/1125343723/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cc6/1125343723/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cc4/1125343723/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cc0/1125343723/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cc6/1125343723/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cbe/1125343723/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cc4/1125343723/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9f1/1cd0ac28/17aa89d88/357d4cbc/1125343723/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Andrew Young
subject: Carrying on Dr. King's legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Rev. Warnock is the civil rights champion we need.
| | |
---
Friend,

In my heart and in this country's long fight for civil rights, Georgia holds a special place. I marched, protested and campaigned with many others to transform a place of great oppression into a state of great opportunity for all - no matter the color of your skin.
**But today that struggle continues, friend.** Our constitutional right to vote is once again under attack, and we are facing a crisis of leadership that goes all the way to the White House. With the future of our democracy at stake, the people of Georgia deserve to have a senator who will give a voice to the voiceless - and who will carry on the critical fights for justice that Georgians like John Lewis, C.T. Vivian and I waged so many years ago. I believe Reverend Warnock (D) is the one for the job.
Reverend Warnock is a leader of uncommon decency and grace in an age where our politicians are lining their pockets instead of lifting up the most vulnerable among us. **I 'm proud to endorse him because I know that he will bring to the U.S. Senate an unwavering moral compass and a firm commitment to fight for all Georgians - but he needs your support to win this competitive race. **
**[If you're as committed as I am to creating a better and brighter future for our country, will you make a contribution now to support Reverend Warnock's Senate campaign? Only together can we flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to our government.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-surrogate?refcode=jtk133-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
When I was elected to Congress in 1972, I was the first Black representative from Georgia since Reconstruction. This November, we have a historic opportunity to not only elect a civil rights champion in Reverend Warnock - but also elect the first Black senator Georgia has ever seen.
But it all comes down to what we do right now, friend. Experts are saying that Georgia's Senate race is _key_ to Democrats' chances of taking back the Senate. **[So please, join me in this fight to elect Reverend Warnock by pitching in what you can so we can restore moral leadership to the Senate, flip Georgia blue and retake the majority for Democrats.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-surrogate?refcode=jtk133-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Andrew Young
| | Andrew Young is a pioneer of the Civil Rights Movement and former mayor of Atlanta. He has served as a U.S. Congressman and was the first Black ambassador to the U.N. clean_body: Rev. Warnock is the civil rights champion we need. | | | Friend, In my heart and in this country's long fight for civil rights, Georgia holds a special place. I marched, protested and campaigned with many others to transform a place of great oppression into a state of great opportunity for all - no matter the color of your skin. But today that struggle continues, friend. Our constitutional right to vote is once again under attack, and we are facing a crisis of leadership that goes all the way to the White House. With the future of our democracy at stake, the people of Georgia deserve to have a senator who will give a voice to the voiceless - and who will carry on the critical fights for justice that Georgians like John Lewis, C.T. Vivian and I waged so many years ago. I believe Reverend Warnock (D) is the one for the job. Reverend Warnock is a leader of uncommon decency and grace in an age where our politicians are lining their pockets instead of lifting up the most vulnerable among us. I 'm proud to endorse him because I know that he will bring to the U.S. Senate an unwavering moral compass and a firm commitment to fight for all Georgians - but he needs your support to win this competitive race. "" When I was elected to Congress in 1972, I was the first Black representative from Georgia since Reconstruction. This November, we have a historic opportunity to not only elect a civil rights champion in Reverend Warnock - but also elect the first Black senator Georgia has ever seen. But it all comes down to what we do right now, friend. Experts are saying that Georgia's Senate race is key to Democrats' chances of taking back the Senate. "" Thank you, Andrew Young | | Andrew Young is a pioneer of the Civil Rights Movement and former mayor of Atlanta. He has served as a U.S. Congressman and was the first Black ambassador to the U.N. | | Dear Friend,
**Did you see[my piece in the Post & Courier](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8a515201c6&e=f1831b4ca2)? **

As all Lowcountry parents look ahead for what is to come this coming school year, it’s important I do two things: (1) hear from you and (2) share with you where I stand.

During these uncertain times, parents need to be empowered to make important decisions about their children's education. And as policy makers seek guidance and insight from communities and families, parental choice must always remain our north star.

We must support parental choice in our children’s education.

Thank you for reading. [See a snippet below and ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=64c1bdc730&e=f1831b4ca2)[click here](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f6f0a3f3ff&e=f1831b4ca2)[ to read the whole piece.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=ddcc70c612&e=f1831b4ca2)

**Reply to this email with any of your ideas, questions, comments, and concerns regarding getting our kids back to school this fall. **

\--

_"As a single working mother of two school-age children, I know the challenges virtual or part-time school would cause many households, including my own. I also know many parents who do not want to send their children to school because they worry about health and safety issues. Imagine if those federal dollars helped you educate your children at home or supported virtual or home school with additional resources outside traditional school.

We should make it easier for parents to make these educational decisions. We can help parents get their children back to school, or help them home school or virtual school, or whatever choice they make for their children.

Our congressman, Joe Cunningham, doesn’t agree. He tweeted his opposition to Gov. McMaster’s plan. In other words, he wants to deny parents and children the best educational opportunities and outcomes during the largest, most unprecedented crisis of our lifetime.

This is what I call a colossal failure of leadership, and an example of being beholden to special interests and government bureaucrats instead of working for parents and students. It makes no sense.

I’ll stand up for educational opportunities for our children and for parents across the Lowcountry in Congress."_

[Read my whole op-ed, "Pandemic makes school choice more important than ever," HERE.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=6226195fce&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Working hard for you, I'm here to help.

Sincerely,

subject: still looking for a response from Peter Willis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The Democratic National Convention is quickly approaching, just 15 days away. |
---
Hey there Peter, it's Joe.

The Democratic National Convention is quickly approaching, just 15 days away. It's going to be a tremendous week for Democrats all over the country to join together, and set the stage for the final two months of this election.

I'm preparing to make the most of convention week, and I had my team pull a list of all the great supporters who have weighed in so far on our pre-convention issue and priorities survey.

**Can you take a moment to fill this out, Peter? subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db60/53d9897e/540ccc14/1c882675/2096359344/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

We hope this email finds you and your loved ones healthy and safe. Our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate and his areas of focus.

**Here's what Mark is working on right now:**
* This week, Mark Warner announced the Department of Justice (DOJ) [pilot program for the Ashanti Alert system](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db60/53d9897e/540ccc14/1c882674/2096359344/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-announces-doj-pilot-program-for-states-to-implement-ashanti-alert-system/"), which was created by legislation he passed in 2018. After months of pressure from Sen. Warner on the DOJ, this life-saving program is at last being implemented. It would help states spread the word about missing persons who are too old for an Amber Alert, and too young for a Silver Alert, which is reserved for senior citizens.

* Mark Warner talked in-depth about his **[plan to help communities of color](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db60/53d9897e/540ccc14/1c882673/2096359344/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://the1a.org/segments/mark-warner-covid-19-elections-relief/")** that have been disproportionately impacted by the coronavirus pandemic. Mark's _Job and Neighborhood Investment Act_ includes investment in Community Development Financial Institutions (CDFIs) and Minority Depository Institutions (MDIs), a Neighborhood Loan Program to support small business lending to businesses serving low- and moderate-income and minority communities, and additional programs to strengthen MDIs and CDFIs, aimed at strengthening the relationship between these institutions and federal agencies like the U.S. Treasury.

* Mark Warner called for [passage of his _States Achieve Medicaid Expansion (SAME) Act_](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db60/53d9897e/540ccc14/1c882672/2096359344/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/senate-republicans-block-warner-attempt-to-pass-medicaid-expansion-measure/"), which would allow states (like Virginia) to further benefit from expanding Medicaid benefits, and to incentivize states that have not already expanded their programs to do so. Mark will continue to fight to expand Medicaid access; he argued that passing this expansion is critically important as the coronavirus pandemic continues and more than 5 million Americans find themselves having lost health insurance benefits tied to their employer.

* Mark Warner supported an amendment that would [expand critical health care and benefits for Vietnam veterans](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db60/53d9897e/540ccc14/1c882671/2096359344/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.13newsnow.com/article/news/national/military-news/amendment-would-add-to-list-of-conditions-caused-by-agent-orange/291-b8293430-c987-4a7a-b20d-88e75a00c62d") suffering from illnesses after exposure to Agent Orange. This amendment has broad bi-partisan support, and would expand benefits for more than 22,000 veterans.

* Mark Warner called for [aid for the U.S. Postal Service](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db60/53d9897e/540ccc14/1c882670/2096359344/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wvtf.org/post/warner-wants-pandemic-aid-postal-service#stream/0") during the pandemic. Millions of Americans rely on the postal service for bills and payments, medication, and other essential services.

* Just because we're physically distancing from one another doesn't mean we can't connect with our elected officials! Mark Warner held another virtual town hall this week with Rep. Bobby Scott to talk about the issues that matter to their constituents. **[Click here to view that town hall](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db60/53d9897e/540ccc14/1c88267f/2096359344/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=346200676377153&ref=watch_permalink")**.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

name: Bettina Weiss
subject: Abigail has been busy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/vbgzM6wNvDSD2VnXy-FDYoOdelaQgHhAEswoPICmvYU=?refcode=BW8.2)
---
|
---
Dear Peter, Abigail fights tirelessly for the people of Central Virginia, and July was no different. Last month was a busy one for Team Spanberger, so I wanted to take the opportunity to fill you in on Abigail's work. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/VYtgjY3TQrFMaAqa_YdbmNFRs3jYHQ00h7t3OmMXge8=) [_**Voter Registration Block Party in Orange**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/VYtgjY3TQrFMaAqa_YdbmNFRs3jYHQ00h7t3OmMXge8=) Last weekend, **Abigail spent the afternoon in Orange at the 'More Than A March Coalition' Block Party.** The inspiring event was organized by two local high school students and focused on educating residents on the voting process and empowering the youth to vote. Abigail joined local community leaders in speaking at the event, saying: _" If we are working to engage all of our community members, and if we are working toward justice in our communities, in our towns, in our Commonwealth and in our country, we will continue to fulfill that ever-present, but so far-off at times, promise of what this nation is and can be. And it is up to all of us to realize the promise of this country."_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/v4OeZBXbVqA_wFNq828buFDARnKGk8LM6rEjv7baTRY=) **_[Computers for Veterans and Students](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/v4OeZBXbVqA_wFNq828buFDARnKGk8LM6rEjv7baTRY=)_** Abigail is always looking for **innovative and immediate ways** to tackle the digital divide in Central Virginia, especially during this COVID-19 crisis when access to computers at home is more important than ever. Earlier this month, she introduced the bipartisan **Computers for Veterans and Students Act, which would provide refurbished government computers to veterans, students, and seniors.** In addition to getting computers into the hands of those who need them, this effort would also reduce government waste, narrow the digital divide, and help qualified nonprofit organizations nationwide fulfill their missions. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/ucyOxeONWCTJml9Sv3ITgGCfH38I69L1XMyLGx3tCQg=) **_[Telehealth & Broadband Expansion](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/n1ori5_uMBfibNqOS0NpRlLh8hj7mSX__YlZxAKB4_c=)_** Telehealth is a vital health service, especially in the middle of the COVID-19 pandemic. But Central Virginians, especially those from rural or underserved areas, are **routinely hampered by poor connectivity.** Telehealth and broadband expansion go hand in hand. That's why Abigail cosponsored the **CONNECT for Health Act,** introduced legislation to maintain critical funding for the **Federal Communications Commission 's COVID-19 Telehealth Program,** and voted to expand the **ReConnect Program** to fund future broadband internet projects in Central Virginia. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/RTwsfoRlM5ES1PUi6IrKmT2ku7J2fDg__1OvI_g1Z30=) _**[Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/RTwsfoRlM5ES1PUi6IrKmT2ku7J2fDg__1OvI_g1Z30=)**_ Abigail and Senator Tim Kaine spoke out on the need to **strengthen Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare** to mark the 80th anniversary of Social Security and the 55th anniversary of Medicare and Medicaid. In 2020, Medicare serves more than 1.5 million across the Commonwealth, and Medicaid serves more than 1.4 million Virginians. But Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security are consistently being attacked and undermined. As the duo writes, **we must reject efforts to gut these programs, and instead look at ways to build upon their frameworks.** During times like these, the need for every family to have affordable insurance and a secure retirement is more important than ever. Please make sure you're following our campaign [_**Twitter,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/Xys3B1SDaQCnFwjQPYGWIprYc30ECnwn4Jo6PEAYoV8=) [_**Facebook,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/ly96cD3Ax9yixWg6gHF42wlvg0TRSoVtEHiMoWvmAVU=) and _**[Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8b-KI581RjZj0pkE0HTYBkIDOe8hcHjFShszkJYjiw=/YLbAEEVRddveBBqgX1PcvkjQ7sXtoF_LYMLAASOirUg=?hl=en)**_ pages to keep up with everything Abigail is up to during these busy summer months. Thank you for your support, _Bettina Weiss_ _Campaign Manager_

clean_body: | | Dear Peter, Abigail fights tirelessly for the people of Central Virginia, and July was no different. Last month was a busy one for Team Spanberger, so I wanted to take the opportunity to fill you in on Abigail's work. = = Last weekend, Abigail spent the afternoon in Orange at the 'More Than A March Coalition' Block Party. The inspiring event was organized by two local high school students and focused on educating residents on the voting process and empowering the youth to vote. Abigail joined local community leaders in speaking at the event, saying: " If we are working to engage all of our community members, and if we are working toward justice in our communities, in our towns, in our Commonwealth and in our country, we will continue to fulfill that ever-present, but so far-off at times, promise of what this nation is and can be. And it is up to all of us to realize the promise of this country." = = Abigail is always looking for innovative and immediate ways to tackle the digital divide in Central Virginia, especially during this COVID-19 crisis when access to computers at home is more important than ever. Earlier this month, she introduced the bipartisan Computers for Veterans and Students Act, which would provide refurbished government computers to veterans, students, and seniors. In addition to getting computers into the hands of those who need them, this effort would also reduce government waste, narrow the digital divide, and help qualified nonprofit organizations nationwide fulfill their missions. = = Telehealth is a vital health service, especially in the middle of the COVID-19 pandemic. But Central Virginians, especially those from rural or underserved areas, are routinely hampered by poor connectivity. Telehealth and broadband expansion go hand in hand. That's why Abigail cosponsored the CONNECT for Health Act, introduced legislation to maintain critical funding for the Federal Communications Commission 's COVID-19 Telehealth Program, and voted to expand the ReConnect Program to fund future broadband internet projects in Central Virginia. = = Abigail and Senator Tim Kaine spoke out on the need to strengthen Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare to mark the 80th anniversary of Social Security and the 55th anniversary of Medicare and Medicaid. In 2020, Medicare serves more than 1.5 million across the Commonwealth, and Medicaid serves more than 1.4 million Virginians. But Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security are consistently being attacked and undermined. As the duo writes, we must reject efforts to gut these programs, and instead look at ways to build upon their frameworks. During times like these, the need for every family to have affordable insurance and a secure retirement is more important than ever. Please make sure you're following our campaign = = and pages to keep up with everything Abigail is up to during these busy summer months. body:
We want to make sure she gets a warm Team Joe welcome right from the start! |
---
Peter,

In case you missed the news, Joe Biden is announcing his running mate soon!

We don't know exactly when he'll share his choice, but we know we want to make sure she gets a warm Team Joe welcome right from the start! So we're putting together a welcome card, and we want everyone on the team to sign it.

[Peter, will you add your name to make sure Joe's running mate gets a huge welcome to the team that's going to defeat Donald Trump in November?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba13/1cd0ac28/17a1aafad/357d483a/2183518833/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/welcome-running-mate-card-nd?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.02_B3_welcomerm_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.02_B3_welcomerm_X__F1_S1_C1__nd") | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba13/1cd0ac28/17a1aafad/357d483a/2183518833/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/welcome-running-mate-card-nd?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.02_B3_welcomerm_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.02_B3_welcomerm_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

Whoever Joe selects as his running mate, we know she will be our best pick to stand with Joe in the battle for the soul of this nation. And with our Democratic ticket set, we'll be ready to charge full speed ahead into the final days of this election.

And together, we're going to defeat Trump and bring unity, empathy, and leadership back into our politics.

**So let 's make sure she gets a huge Team Joe welcome from day one, Peter! Will you add your name to welcome Joe's running mate to the team?**

[We don't know when we'll need to send her this card, but it could be very soon, so make sure to sign your name before midnight >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba13/1cd0ac28/17a1aafad/357d483a/2183518833/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/welcome-running-mate-card-nd?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.02_B3_welcomerm_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.02_B3_welcomerm_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

Team Joe

body:
We need four seats to flip the Senate. |
---
Hi there,

As I said on the campaign trail, to turn the page on the current divisive Republican leadership and start a new chapter defined by unity and compassion, we don't just need to win the White House -- **_Democrats must retake the Senate too._**

To win back the Senate, to take the gavel out of Mitch McConnell's hands and break his grip on progress, Democrats need to net four seats this November.

**Jon Ossoff can win in Georgia, friend!**

**I'm proud to endorse my friend Jon Ossoff, and I'm going to do everything I can to make sure we elect bold candidates like Jon who will deliver generational change.**

**[Will you join me in supporting Jon by making a donation of $10 to help him win in Georgia and flip the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e206e/5b2c1286/3e56cd2a/25f12c23/2019063846/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_03_end_pb?refcode=em_2020_08_03_end_pb&amount=10")**

| | | | Lee's Newsletter - August 2nd
---
| | Hi everyone, Eid Mubarak to all who celebrated Eid-ul-Adha this weekend as my wife and I did. Eid-ul-Adha is a Muslim holiday that has historically been celebrated with a sacrifice of an animal, with some or most of the meat given away to feed people who are hungry. Those who don't have livestock - like us - give to charities that provide food to those in need. This holiday commemorates Abraham's sacrifice, a story common to the Christian, Jewish and Muslim faiths. And is also a reminder to me of how much our faiths have in common. Yesterday I had a socially distant meeting on my back patio with Gregory Snyder, our newly elected chair of the Northumberland County Dems.
---
| |
---
| We had a great conversation and discussed ideas for how we can collaborate (and our shared love of the Hamilton musical). Greg's passion for his community and the future of Northumberland County is undeniable. I can't wait to work with him and the Northumberland Dems throughout the campaign and beyond.
---
| | This week we continued our virtual town hall tour of the district, meeting with Potter and Perry Counties. I was thrilled to be joined by George Scott, the Democratic candidate for State Senate District 15, on the Perry County call. These town halls featured really engaging conversations about health care, agriculture, the state of our democracy and much more. I also had the chance to speak with Senator Bob Casey, Snyder County Chair and State Senate candidate Michelle Siegel, and the Snyder County Dems at their virtual committee meeting on Wednesday evening. We had the opportunity to share with Sen. Casey the issues we're hearing about from voters in Central PA, including the Covid-19 response, property taxes and healthcare. He was very interested in how he could help our communities, and we look forward to working with him in the future. On Monday, we learned the details of the latest stimulus proposal, which proposes reducing or eliminating many of the benefits from the Cares Act. One of the most troubling items in the bill is the sharp reduction in unemployment assistance, from $600 to $200 per week. The existing unemployment benefit expired at the end of July, and now Americans who are out of work are waiting on Congress to pass a new bill before receiving any additional federal unemployment support. I hope that the federal government can act quickly to provide relief to the people and the economy until the virus is under control. The President's tweet this week suggesting that the election be delayed was met with resistance from both Democrats and Republicans in Congress. While this continues the trend of attempts from the White House to distract from other issues and undermine our democracy, it was reassuring to see Congress act in a bi-partisan way to defend the Constitution. The President does not have the authority to change the election date, and I was glad to see members of both parties remind him of that. The tweet was also an attack on voting from home, which is going to be the safest way to vote this November. Fortunately, Pennsylvania is going to pay for the postage for voters who request mail-in ballots in November. That will make it even easier for everyone to cast a ballot and make their voices heard without having to risk their health. It's not too early to request a mail-in ballot, which you can do at [this link](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/f6NEmmoBd/c?w=9ScajSs9RqWyiINLjPiZ_KYur8ubMqqB5VBqr0dkUxw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF2b3RlcnNlcnZpY2VzLnBhLmdvdi9PbmxpbmVBYnNlbnRlZUFwcGxpY2F0aW9uLyMvT25saW5lQWJzZW50ZWVCZWdpbiIsInIiOiJhYmQ4NTU1OC0xYWZlLTQ3YWYtODc4Yi1lMjllYTg0MDI0NGMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ). name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Fate of Walz' Powers Is In Their Hands
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fate_of_walz_powers&n=1)
---
Peter \-- It's **Day 142** **of Walz' Emergency Powers** where your rights and the Constitution have taken a back seat to his unilateral orders. The Merriam-Webster Dictionary defines "dictator" as "a person granted absolute emergency power." Those on the left and their friends in the media will shame us for making this association, but what else do you call a person making the rules on what job is essential, what must be worn in public places, what models schools must use and what businesses can stay open? **There's nothing more un-American than a system of government with one person calling all the shots. It's sorta, ya know, the thing we fought our independence over.** After several months of pressure, we finally got all Republican legislators on board with our call to end Walz' Emergency Powers using a joint resolution that must pass the House and Senate. At this point, we've seen it pass the Senate twice now and the House has four Democrats already on board. **All we need now is five more rural or suburban Democrats!** The next Special Session will be called on August 13th and we have a real opportunity to End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. Are you willing to help us? We need you to contact these seven DFL legislators and tell them to vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers on August 13th. **Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Rep Jeanne Poppe - 651-296-4193 /[rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn)** **Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Rep Brad Tabke - 651-296-8872 /[rep.brad.tabke@house.mn](mailto:%20rep.brad.tabke@house.mn)********Rep Zach Stephenson - 651-296-5513 /[rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn](mailto:%20rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn)** **Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)**
## Fill up their inboxes and phone lines with this message:
Script: Rep _______, I'm reaching out to you as a concerned Minnesotan who believes our state is in bad shape with Governor Walz making unilateral decisions. His orders are harming our economy and they are anti-democratic. Vote YES on August 13th to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Alternate Script: Rep ________, I've watched you vote against our democratic form of government four times now by protecting Walz' Emergency Powers. Enough is enough! Vote YES for the Resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers on August 13th. While you make these calls, we'll be running ads in their districts and bringing the heat. Politicians care about one thing: getting re-elected. Let's let them know they are in bad shape this November if they don't do the right thing! ** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**

name: Blue Georgia
subject: just hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, this is a _big _deal.

After hearing that our opponent, Kelly Loeffler (R), started spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat - and that we fell short of our critical end-of-month match goal - **a group of donors stepped up to EXTEND our triple-match up to $15,000!**
**If we want any _ _ chance at electing Raphael Warnock (D) as the FIRST-EVER Black senator from Georgia and flipping the Senate for Democrats, we need to take advantage of this incredible opportunity to have _every dollar tripled_ before it expires at midnight.**

subject: MORE BLOOMBERG NEWS --- WE NEED YOUR HELP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
🚩 🚩Bloomberg spending big for Bill Clifford | | |
---
| | Fellow Kansans,

PJ Media, one of the most read conservative websites in America, wrote an [article](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=bf514e8ba0&e=a9d1410029) on Friday highlighting how Jeff Bezos and Michael Bloomberg are utilizing With Honor PAC to support Bill Clifford and move Congress to the left. Here are a few highlights:

_“Jeff Bezos and Mike Bloomberg are the two largest donors listed for a new political action committee (PAC) called With Honor... A closer look reveals this agenda as more progressive than they let on and, once again, Mike Bloomberg is throwing large sums of dark money into local politics around the country to buy seats and advance his vision.”_

Bloomberg clearly expects returns on his investments. During his most famous debate moment, we all remember Michael Bloomberg’s famous [line](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=cb82df685e&e=a9d1410029), “I bought that” when bragging how he “bought” Nancy Pelosi the House majority. And Bloomberg knows, with Bill Clifford’s record of raising property taxes, supporting amnesty, and criticizing President Trump, that he will get a return on the $420,000 he and Jeff Bezos have spent trying to elect Bill Clifford.
---
|
---
| | And to be clear, there is no one who respects our veterans more than Tracey Mann. He comes from a family tree full of veterans. But the With Honor Fund is not the VFW. It doesn’t provide services to veterans. Their funders have a political agenda and the organization is carrying it out.

Michael Bloomberg, Jeff Bezos and Bill Clifford have spent over $1,200,000 smearing Tracey Mann. They’ve lied about where he lives, lied about him being a Republican, and lied about his commitment to life.

But here’s the good news – Kansas Republicans are not fooled. Kansans know Tracey Mann is a man of honor and integrity. They know he lives his conservative, pro-life values every day. They know Tracey Mann will fight for our Kansas conservative values in Washington.

We are sprinting to the finish line when polls close on Tuesday at 7:00. Tracey has been to all 63 counties multiple times; we’ve walked and called over 100,000 Kansans. We won’t stop fighting until the last vote is in.

_We need your help now._ We need you to text or call your friends and family. We need you to forward this email to your contacts. We need you to post why you are supporting our campaign on social media.

With your efforts, we are confident we will be successful on Election Day and start to turn Congress in the right direction.

Yours in the fight,

Team Mann
